prompt:
A small business started the year with an operating budget of $24,000.
In the first quarter (Q1), they spent 30% of their initial budget.
In the second quarter (Q2), they received an emergency grant that increased their *current* funds by 25%.
In the third quarter (Q3), they used 40% of the funds they had at the *beginning* of Q3.
Finally, in the fourth quarter (Q4), they had an unexpected income that added $3,500 to their remaining funds.

What was their total operating budget at the end of the year?
